_comment: Committed boundary/regression seeds for the control-plane fence/ordering/slot predicate triple-mirror differential (issue #33). These are the human-readable mirror of the Go literals the generators always cover (fenceBoundaryTuples / offsetBoundaryPairs / slotBoundaryIDs in webhook/predicate_differential_test.go; streamSeqBoundaryPairs in store/redis/predicate_streamseq_test.go). rapid also auto-persists any FAILING seed under testdata/rapid/<TestName>/ on a divergence; promote a minimized one here as a named regression row. The generators draw from the Go literals directly, so editing this file is documentation, not the source of coverage.

fence_tuples._schema: [cur_gen, cur_wake, req_gen, req_wake, token_gen] -> may_proceed iff all three gens equal AND req_wake==cur_wake AND req_wake!=""

offset_pairs._schema: [a, b] -> offsetGreater(a,b); "-1" and "" are equivalent beginning sentinels (less than any real offset)

slot_ids._schema: subscription ids; SlotOf strips a trailing :g:<digits> claim-granularity suffix (only when the suffix is all digits and non-empty)

stream_seq_pairs._schema: [last, next] -> conflict iff last != "" AND next <= last bytewise (INV-DIFF-03)
